name: circuit-sdk
description: Circuit SDK — TypeScript toolkit for the Circuit decentralized-LLM ecosystem (x402-paid inference, data, wallet, and hosted agents with off-box custody). See SDK.md.

scripts.typecheck: for p in core x402 inference data wallet agent node onchain sdk; do tsc -p packages/$p/tsconfig.json || exit 1; done
scripts.build: for p in core x402 inference data wallet agent node onchain sdk; do (cd packages/$p && npx tsup src/index.ts --format esm --dts --clean --out-dir dist) || exit 1; done
